headline: Samsung Bioepis Relaunches BYOOVIZ® (ranibizumab-nuna) in the United States in Partnership with Harrow
summary: INCHEON, Korea, July 01, 2026--Samsung Bioepis Co., Ltd. today announced the relaunch of BYOOVIZ® (ranibizumab-nuna) in the United States (US), in partnership with Harrow (Nasdaq: HROW). Harrow became responsible for commercialization of BYOOVIZ® (ranibizumab-nuna), a biosimilar referencing LUCENTIS1 (ranibizumab), and OPUVIZ™ (aflibercept-yszy), a biosimilar referencing EYLEA2 (aflibercept), upon full transition of commercialization rights from Biogen back to Samsung Bioepis by the end of 2025.
